title: CILogBench case tags (M9)
description: Per-case descriptive tags used for dataset analysis and split-balance reports. NOT passed to summarizers or diagnosers.

split.description: v1.3 splits (dev/holdout/stress) and v2 splits (v2/dev, v2/holdout, v2/stress). v2 splits are introduced in cilogbench-v2; the path-style string matches the on-disk cases/<split>/<case_id>/ layout.

origin.description: Provenance tag introduced for cilogbench-v2. legacy_v1_3 = case carried over from the v1.3 corpus. new_v2 = case collected for v2. Optional; absent on cases that pre-date the v2 schema bump and have not yet been migrated.

ecosystem.description: Ecosystem the failing job belongs to. Pick the most specific match; only use 'other' when nothing fits and the matrix should be extended. Introduced in v2; optional on legacy v1.3 cases until backfilled.

ci_provider.description: CI provider that produced the raw log. Defaults to github_actions for v1.3 and most of v2. Introduced in v2; optional.

repo_visibility.description: public = upstream run is publicly viewable. private = collector has explicit publication permission. redacted = log was lightly modified to remove secrets per cilogbench_v2_collection_guidelines.md §6. Introduced in v2; optional.

signal_position.description: early = primary evidence in first 25% of raw log; middle 25-75%; late >75%; scattered across multiple regions.

evidence_formats.description: Surface forms of the critical evidence in the log. Entries from 'assertion_diff' onward are introduced in v2; legacy v1.3 cases never use them.
